name: National Elite League | My Hero Academia
description:
If NEL were in the MHA world. Eight different teams that have different values when it comes to heroic work and fighting that you can choose from. All #1 heroes are OC except for Japan and America's (Endeavor and Stars and Stripes)
Japan - Direct Force, all-out attack capabilities.
America - Bold Heroics, wide-scaled quirk abilities.
Nigeria - Endurance, Terrain control, holding the line
England - Teamwork, morale amplification,
Mexico - Mobility, aerial, acrobatics
Germany - Precision, weakening cohesion
Canada - Defense, restraint, efficient/fast takedowns
Russia - Battlefield Control, Non-lethal extraction
creator: LYT
